name: Kremsils (Matzoh Meal Pancakes)
recipeIngredient: Maple syrup (or flavor of your choice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet. Turn off the flame.
2. Break eggs into a mixing bowl and beat until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the griddle. Add milk, matzo meal, cottage cheese, corn oil, nuts, vanilla, and salt. Beat until smooth.
4. Serve hot, accompanied by syrup (or honey or preserves if preferred).
5. Set the flame to moderate and fry until golden brown on both sides.
